name: Lemon and Garlic Broiled or Grilled Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons olive oil or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken breasts, skin side up, in a dish or plastic bag.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Mix together the oil, lemon juice, garlic, and rosemary.
4. Pour the juice mixture over the chicken, and cover or seal the bag.
5. Marinate, refrigerated, for as long as possible, up to 2 days.
6. When ready to serve, place the chicken, skin side turned towards the heat, under the broiler or on a preheated grill 6 inches from the heat.
7. Cook for 15 minutes, turning once and continuing to cook until done, about 15 more minutes. The juices should run clear when pierced with a fork.
8. May be made ahead of time and reheated, but is best hot off the grill.
Yield: Serves 4
